fixture_note: Static mobile/web execution pack smoke only; not live robot state.
phone_copy: 请放入垃圾，确认安全后再开始送达。

default_hardware_set_summary: default hardware set=mobile base + upper board + pocket WiFi + camera + microphone + speaker
2D LiDAR and ToF remain target sensor baseline material, not installed proof
target_sensor_baseline_summary: target sensor baseline=monocular camera + 2D LiDAR + ToF safety ring
hardware_baseline_source_alignment.vendor_source_boundary: source boundary=docs/vendor/VENDOR_INDEX.md and local vendor references; phone copy never exports raw vendor material
missing_alignment_items: installation / wiring / calibration / HIL entry material=not_proven
hardware_baseline_source_alignment.safe_phone_copy: 硬件基线来源对齐只读展示默认硬件集、目标传感器基线、vendor/source 边界和缺失对齐项；这是 software proof only。
hardware_baseline_source_alignment.recovery_hint: 按 docs/vendor/VENDOR_INDEX.md 和 production hardware boundary 补齐 2D LiDAR / ToF 来源、收货、安装、接线、标定和 HIL entry 的脱敏材料。

hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.blocker: blocker=missing 2D LiDAR / ToF source, procurement, mounting, wiring, calibration, HIL entry material
material_templates: mounting / wiring / calibration / HIL entry templates=not_proven
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.owner_handoff: owner_handoff=Hardware owner fills phone-safe material templates before field/HIL entry review.
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.safe_rerun_command: safe_rerun_command=rerun hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pack gate with redacted material summary.
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.safe_phone_copy: 传感器采购执行包只读展示采购材料模板、blocker、owner handoff 和 safe rerun command；这是 software proof only。
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.recovery_hint: 补齐真实 2D LiDAR / ToF source、procurement、mounting、wiring、calibration 和 HIL entry 材料后再重跑执行包。
not_proven: 真实 material templates filled by owner

missing_materials: installation / wiring / calibration / HIL entry material=not_proven
accepted_materials: safe receipt intake envelope accepted for software proof only
rejected_materials: non-redacted receipt material must be rejected
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.owner_handoff: owner_handoff=Hardware owner回填脱敏收货摘要，再进入安装/接线/标定/HIL entry review。
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.next_required_evidence: next_required_evidence=真实 receipt/source/SKU、安装、接线、标定和 HIL entry 的 phone-safe 摘要。
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.safe_phone_copy: 传感器采购收货回填只读展示材料接收、缺失、拒绝、owner handoff 和 next required evidence；这是 software proof only。
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.recovery_hint: 补齐脱敏 receipt/source/SKU、安装、接线、标定和 HIL entry 材料后再重跑收货回填 gate。

sensor_count_summary: sensor_count_summary=2D LiDAR count and ToF channel count must stay parameterized
threshold_summary: threshold_summary=near-field safety threshold and validation confidence must be configured
frame_ids_summary: frame_ids_summary=sensor/base/mount calibration frames must be declared in phone-safe summary
safety_policy_summary: safety_policy_summary=missing config, missing evidence, unsupported schema, unsafe copy, or success claim fails closed
hardware_sensor_hil_entry_config_prechec.owner_handoff: owner_handoff=Hardware owner supplies parameterized sensor config summary; Robot owner keeps diagnostics metadata-only; Full-stack keeps panel read-only.
hardware_sensor_hil_entry_config_prechec.safe_copy: 传感器 HIL 入口配置预检只读展示 precheck status、sensor count、threshold、frame IDs、safety policy、缺失材料、next evidence 和 owner handoff；这是 software proof only。

route_task_terminal_completion_rehearsal.recovery_reason: recovery_reason=collect same evidence_ref task record, completion signal, dropoff/cancel material and diagnostics summary before field review
operator_next_steps: 使用同一 safe evidence_ref 回填 task record 摘要
补齐 dropoff 或 cancel terminal material phone-safe 摘要
route_task_terminal_completion_rehearsal.safe_phone_copy: 任务终态复账只读展示 terminal verdict、dropoff/cancel material status、failure/recovery reason 和 operator next steps；这是 software proof only。
route_task_terminal_completion_rehearsal.recovery_hint: 请在下一次受控现场 session 中按同一 evidence_ref 补齐 task record、completion signal、dropoff/cancel material 和 diagnostics mobile summary。

route_task_terminal_review_decision.decision_reason: decision_reason=real route/task/dropoff/cancel terminal materials are still missing
route_task_terminal_review_decision.owner_handoff: owner_handoff=Autonomy owner collects same evidence_ref route/task terminal material; Robot owner republishes metadata-only diagnostics summary; Full-stack keeps phone panel read-only.
next_required_evidence: next_required_evidence=dropoff or cancel terminal material phone-safe summary
route_task_terminal_review_decision.field_retest_request_guidance: field_retest_request_guidance=request controlled field retest only after same evidence_ref terminal materials are redacted and attached.
route_task_terminal_review_decision.safe_phone_copy: 终态复核决策只读展示 review decision、decision reason、owner handoff、next evidence 和 field retest guidance；这是 software proof only。
route_task_terminal_review_decision.recovery_hint: 补齐同一 evidence_ref 的 task record、completion signal、dropoff/cancel material 和 diagnostics summary 后再请求复测。

required_field_materials_summary: required_field_material=真实 Nav2/fixed-route runtime log phone-safe summary
required_field_material=task record and operator field note phone-safe summary
required_field_material=diagnostics and mobile summary on same evidence_ref
rerun_command_summary: rerun_command_summary=run controlled field retest gate with redacted same evidence_ref materials
rerun_command_summary=rerun diagnostics/mobile summary publication after field materials are attached
route_task_field_retest_execution_pack.operator_handoff: operator_handoff=Autonomy owner runs the controlled field retest; Robot owner republishes metadata-only diagnostics; Full-stack keeps the phone panel read-only.
field_retest_checklist: field_retest_checklist=confirm same safe evidence_ref across route log, completion signal, task record and diagnostics summary
field_retest_checklist=attach operator field note and dropoff/cancel terminal material summary
field_retest_checklist=keep Start, Confirm Dropoff and Cancel gating unchanged
route_task_field_retest_execution_pack.safe_phone_copy: 现场复测执行包只读展示 execution status、same evidence_ref requirement、field materials、rerun command summary、operator handoff 和 checklist；这是 software proof only。
route_task_field_retest_execution_pack.recovery_hint: 下一次真实现场复测前，请按同一 safe evidence_ref 补齐真实路线日志、completion signal、task record、operator note 和 diagnostics/mobile summary。

route_task_field_retest_session_handoff.session_owner: session_owner=Autonomy owner hosts the field retest session; Robot owner republishes metadata-only diagnostics; Full-stack keeps mobile read-only.
required_field_materials_summary: required_field_material=route completion signal and task record phone-safe summary
required_field_material=door state, target floor confirmation and human assistance note summary
required_field_material=dropoff/cancel completion and delivery result phone-safe summary
rerun_commands_summary: rerun_commands_summary=run route-task field retest session handoff gate with redacted same evidence_ref materials
rerun_commands_summary=rerun Robot diagnostics publication after handoff summary is attached
operator_next_steps: operator_next_step=confirm all required field materials before starting the on-site retest session
operator_next_step=copy only safe_copy into Product closeout and support notes
operator_next_step=leave Start, Confirm Dropoff and Cancel gating unchanged
route_task_field_retest_session_handoff.safe_phone_copy: 路线任务现场复测交接只读展示 handoff status、session owner、required materials、rerun commands、operator next steps 和 evidence boundary；这是 software proof only。
route_task_field_retest_session_handoff.safe_copy: 路线任务现场复测交接 safe_copy：当前状态 ready_for_field_retest_session_handoff_not_proven；session owner 已分配；下一次现场会只允许使用同一 safe evidence_ref 的脱敏材料；delivery_success=false；primary_actions_enabled=false。
route_task_field_retest_session_handoff.recovery_hint: 如果缺少 safe_copy 或同一 evidence_ref 的现场材料，请保持 blocked/not_proven，并要求 Autonomy/Robot owner 重新发布 session handoff summary。
not_proven: 真实电梯门状态和目标楼层确认

route_task_field_retest_result_intake.material_completeness: material_completeness=3/8 phone-safe summaries present; door_state, target_floor_confirmation and human_assistance_note still missing.
operator_next_steps: operator_next_step=collect eight result material summaries under the same safe evidence_ref
operator_next_step=keep Start, Confirm Dropoff and Cancel gating unchanged
route_task_field_retest_result_intake.safe_phone_copy: 路线任务现场复测结果入口只读展示 intake status、material completeness、八类结果材料摘要、missing material list、operator next steps 和 evidence boundary；这是 software proof only。
route_task_field_retest_result_intake.safe_copy: 路线任务现场复测结果入口 safe_copy：当前状态 blocked_missing_route_task_field_retest_result_materials_not_proven；door_state、target_floor_confirmation、human_assistance_note 等结果材料仍缺失；delivery_success=false；primary_actions_enabled=false。
route_task_field_retest_result_intake.recovery_hint: 请按同一 safe evidence_ref 补齐八类结果材料，并由 Robot diagnostics 发布 compatible summary 后再复核。
